text: I feel a sense of anticipation mixed with curiosity as I stand before this glass-walled room, observing the vibrant and modern design within. The bright colors and bold letters—'R+D'—signal innovation and research, inviting me to contemplate the spontaneous potential of creative spaces. There is also a subtle nervousness, as if I am on the edge of discovery, both welcomed and challenged by the unknown that lies just past this transparent barrier.
